content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1530: Pure Gold Spirit Ant

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Zi Yao looked emotionally sincere. Her eyes were like rippling lights and her voice was touching.

She was so surprised, though. She could never estimate that Shi Yan had refined the Absolute Beginning body after a short course of dozens of years being away from Desolate Territory.

It meant that Shi Yan’s body’s evolution wasn’t less than theirs. It meant that Shi Yan could reach the ultimate undying level of life.

She couldn’t consider Shi Yan, a piece on her chessboard, as a trivial character. Today, she knew Shi Yan matters. She finally considered Shi Yan an equal existence like Desolate and Devour.

Thus, she made use of the knot of love between Shi Yan and her clone to mess his mind up.

The experts of Empty Land felt the shockwaves from the impact of earth and heaven energy and saw the giant creatures in the sky. They hurried to gather.

There were the peak existences of the Seven Great Clans like Keith of the Ancient Monster Clan, Labitte of the Devouring Clan, and Neptune of the Soul Clan...

They all got the news and they were gathering in Empty Land to attend a secret summit.

There were also many warriors who didn’t belong to the Seven Great Clans. They were the famous experts living for a long time on Empty Land. Also, many of them weren’t weaker than Emperor Sea Shark as they were at First Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm.

An old man with a hunch back holding a bone staff was standing and shaking in the crowd. He had a wrinkled face accompanied by a long, gray beard that touched the ground. His brown eyes were moving swiftly as he gazed at Zi Yao’s graceful body. Vague, strange lights shot out from his eyes.

The hunch-backed man wasn’t eye-catching in the crowd; he didn’t have an earth-shaking aura. However, when Zi Yao released rainbow bands to bind Forefather Dragon Lizard’s giant lizard body, the shockwaves had wobbled a lot of warriors. The old man with the bone staff stood still as if he was rooted there.

Not far from him, Gay of the White Bone Clan had just arrived and noticed that old man. He felt familiar as he remembered someone had told him about this old man. Gay frowned and tried to search his memories.

“I don’t remember the old love?” Shi Yan urged his giant body and stood on Empty Land like a giant Demon conquering the entire world. His voice thundered, “Let alone that you’re not Zi Yao. Even if you are, I won’t let you eat Dragon Lizard!”

The ferocious Giant stretched his body, the two wings that were like continents opened!

Crack! Crack!

Layers of spaces emerged on the wings and created many tiles, each tile a different space. Hundreds of small tiles merged into a massive cube that was radiating dazzlingly and filling with chaotic and unpredictable space energy.

Each side of that massive cube had different spaces where there were many sparkling planets. Those planets had mountains, lakes, rocks, and many plants that weren’t different from a real world.

The world created of many spaces suddenly appeared and merged with a real world under Zi Yao’s heavenly twelve-headed snake, separating Zi Yao’s true body and clone.

Forefather Dragon Lizard couldn’t even lift his face under the pressure from Zi Yao. Suddenly, he roared and got rid of her restraint.

Zi Yao hovered above the giant lizard, her flowery cheeks cold. She snorted and then said, “You control a lot of things.”

“Shi Yan! You dare to kill Ferrell of my clan! The Ancient Monster Clan won’t let you leave Empty Land alive!” Keith was like an ant that yelled at Shi Yan’s giant body, his voice reverberating the entire Empty land.

Neptune was bobbing between his brutal souls. He sneered and floated up to face Shi Yan. “Absolute Beginning body, Territory Ancestor Realm. Haha, if I kill you and eat you, perhaps I can have an Absolute Beginning body too!”

Neptune became greedy.

“You don’t want to live anymore.”

Shi Yan’s ear-piercing smirk echoed. A vast and brilliant galaxy appeared as his two hands pulled the void. Diamond-like stars moved and showed the most beautiful and mysterious area of the universe.

All of a sudden, Skyfall Star River became a massive net that could shroud the entire world aiming at Neptune and Keith of the Ancient Monster Clan.

“Stars move. Suns and moons shuttle!”

An ancient, low-pitched voice ran directly in people’s Sea of Consciousness. The starlight rays moved and weaved with each other like a big hammock. The suns, moons, and stars released their lights with high heat. Together, their blinding halos filled this entire world.

Neptune and Keith, the two Territory Ancestors sneered and urged their power Upanishads when Skyfall Star River fell upon them.

“Soul Bridge!”

Billions of ghosts and brutal souls gathered and created a bridge, which reached endlessly to the deep area of the Soul Clan to wake up the brutal souls that the Soul Clan had nourished. The restless crying and screeching came from the other end of the soul bridge. The soul-destroying sounds of billions of crying souls had been transmitted through the Soul Bridge.

Pufft! Pufft! Pufft!

Dozens of experts at the Incipient God Realm and Immortal Realm near Neptune vomited blood and trembled hard. They turned as pale as white paper.

That soul-destroying sound wasn’t aimed at them. They were innocent victims.

Shi Yan bore the attack. His giant body wobbled. The soul-destroying sounds were like sharp lances hitting his soul altar and hurting it shortly.

At the same time, Keith of the Ancient Monster Clan sneered and held a shell that was made of neither gold nor jade. Cold light dots sparkled inside the shell when some rumbling noises arose. So many tiny insects that even naked eyes couldn’t see flew out. Billions of them had pierced through Skyfall Star River and attacked Shi Yan’s giant body.

“Pure God Spirit Ants!”

Zi Yao screamed in panic. Her true body in the void quietly disappeared.

The Pure Gold Spirit Ants had existed since the Absolute Beginning Era. This kind of insect was so terrifying even to Absolute Beginning creatures. They were so minute that eyes couldn’t see them and there were billions of them with a horrible reproduction rate. They just needed blood and flesh to create their next generation within seconds!

One thousand Pure Gold Spirit Ants could create several later generations in one minute with the body of an Incipient God Realm expert as its food source. They could become billions quickly!

To the creatures with giant bodies, the Pure God Spirit Ants were more powerful. This sort of ant was their nemesis, indeed.

As Keith knew Shi Yan had the Absolute Beginning body and killed Ferrell, he must have prepared something before he attacked him. The Pure Gold Spirit Ants were an instant-kill attack that Keith had spent hundreds of years to find. He had labored to breed them to this massive scale.

It was his secret weapon specialized for Absolute Beginning creatures. He hoped that he could use those ants to suck the Absolute Beginning creatures’ blood and energy. Seeing Shi Yan and Zi Yao, the desire in his heart burned him. He immediately used the Pure Gold Spirit Ants to achieve what he had dreamed of for so many years.

As soon as the Pure Gold Spirit Ants were released, the rhythmical chirping sounds reverberated everywhere. Shi Yan discolored.

His co-soul felt insecure. He immediately recognized that those ants were lethal to his giant body.

As people were gazing at him, his body shrank rapidly. After each second, he got dozens of times smaller. After seven seconds, he had returned to his normal size.

At this moment, the Pure Gold Spirit Ants were swarming like gold sand and trying to suck his body’s energy.

As the others were gazing at him, Shi Yan’s acupuncture points diffused white mist and smoke. As soon as the mist permeated the area, an extremely sour smell arose. The ants that people couldn’t see with their naked eyes screeched in fear and tried to retreat.

Boop! Boop! Boop! Boop!

Low but thick breaking sounds echoed as the ants eroded and melted.

Keith’s face changed greatly. He couldn’t help but shout at Labitte, “How did he get the Corrosion power Upanishad?”

Not far from them, Labitte of the Devouring Clan looked dark. “He used Devouring power Upanishad to swallow and refine my clan’s Young Master. He got all the power Upanishads that our Young Master had.”

Hearing him, the warriors in this area discolored. Pu Tai of the Devouring Clan was very famous. He was predicted to be the most outstanding young expert of the new generation in the Sea Domain of Nihility and was much more talented than Mei Ji and the others. Pu Tai had disappeared mysteriously, puzzling many other warriors. Now, from Labitte, they knew that Pu Tai was killed by Shi Yan.

Shi Yan’s intimidation had grown further!

“Little lizard! Come to mama!” Zi Yao’s laughter arose again.

The giant body of the twelve-headed snake that had just disappeared suddenly reappeared by Forefather Dragon Lizard. As Shi Yan was fighting against Keith and Neptune, the snakes wound and squeezed Forefather Dragon Lizard’s body, dragging him towards a territory entrance.

Zi Yao’s beautiful clone was sitting on the gold throne above one of the snake heads. She looked contented.

“After I get his blood and recovered my power, I will find you, naughty little boy!”

Swoosh!

A shadow shot rapidly like a lightning strike cutting through the darkness at Zi Yao.

Gay of the White Bone Clan discolored in fear. He recognized that the one who had just zoomed away was the hunk backed old man standing near him.

Gay tried to squeeze his brain to search for the old man’s identity. After a flash, he got it and screamed, “Yuan Zu, one of the Ten Great Territory Ancestors!”
